description: Legal query to [... ha-Rav] ha-Gadol be-Yisraʾel concerning a mercantile transaction. Mentions the Dār al-Wakāla; a deal betwen two merchants; and how the merchandise was fined 10 mithqāls after it came out that it contained stolen goods (masrūqa). . (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: שאלה משפטית בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
